title: Ice Cube Tray Silicone Party Summer Drinks BBQ Tableware Round Pack of 2

Comes as a pack of 2 in Blue and Green - Perfect for party, BBQ or simply at home
Size approx L:28cm W:11.5cm H:2.5cm. Ice Cube size is approx - 3cm x 2.5cm Each tray produces 21 ice cubes
Hand Wash only Has a plastic hanging hook
Also available in Pink and Orange
